stadium.infoNote: Construction starts on the next turn and blocks further expansions until complete. After full upgrades, Rico Pérez capacity can reach 42,000 spectators.

economy.title: Club financial report
economy.lede: The numbers tell the project's story: cash, wage bill and outlook. This is not a BI dashboard — it is the report sports press would read.
economy.unavailableHint: The finance module has not returned data yet.
economy.sponsorBreakConfirm: An 8% penalty applies for each remaining year. Confirm termination?
economy.outsourcingCancelBody: Cancel {{name}}? You will stop paying the monthly cost.

sponsors.intro: Base amount = valuation × cost of living (manual §7.3). More years signed → higher % of base. Breaking pays 8% per remaining year. No contract → income 0.

outsourcing.intro: Without security attendance is capped at 5,000 and without maintenance at 10,000 (manual §7.5).

preseason.title: Pre-season · friendlies and training camps
preseason.intro: Booked in July and held in August (manual §7.4): affect the whole squad — fitness 70–90%, morale +2 to +15, prestige +1 to +10, skills +1 to +10 without exceeding talent.
preseason.scheduleHint: Only within the pre-season window ({{window}}, in-game date) · max. {{max}}/season.

analysis.unavailableHint: The analysis endpoint did not respond. Retry in a few seconds.
analysis.leagueAverage: LEAGUE AVERAGE · valuation {{valuation}} · budget {{budget}} · wage bill {{salary}}/mo

market.title: Transfer market
market.lede: Hot phones, clauses and rumours on the director's desk. The squad's future is decided here — with the transfer clock always ticking.

empty.freeAgentsHint: Players without a club will appear here.
empty.listings: No one has listed players for sale
empty.listingsHint: List for sale from your Squad.
empty.rumorsHint: The market is very quiet this week.
empty.offersHint: Your transfer offers will appear here.

clause.label: Release clause:
clause.windowClosed: Window closed: the server will reject it.
clause.confirmBody: You will pay {{amount}} for {{player}}'s release clause. This operation is irrevocable.

freeAgent.intro: Free agent — direct signing with no transfer fee (counts toward wage cap):

confirm.withdrawBody: Withdraw this offer from the market? You won't be able to recover it.
confirm.listingBody: Remove this player from the transfer market?
confirm.sabotageBody: You will spend 120 prestige points to sow discord in the rival dressing room. Maximum 1 per week.
confirm.loanBody: Loan {{player}} to {{club}}? The destination club will cover the wage until end of season.

rumors.title: Rumor meter
rumors.dirtyWarBefore: spend 120 prestige to sow a dressing room crisis against
rumors.dirtyWarAfter: before the derby. Max 1/week. The rival can deny it (60 prestige).

loan.windowClosed: ⚠ The loan window is closed — the server will reject the move until it opens.
loan.modalHint: The destination club pays the wage during the loan. Returns at end of season.

squad.title: Your squad, face to face
squad.lede: Get to know each player before picking the XI. The dressing room view is your reference; the table is for cold analysis.
squad.emptyHint: No players in this list yet.

command.title: Squad centre
command.description: Pick the XI, detect absences, control contracts and compare every player's competitive condition.
command.xiReadyHint: The lineup can compete in the next turn.
command.xiNeedsWork: Review the XI before the next match.
command.boardHint: What needs attention before the next turn
command.noFilterResultsHint: Change the filters to display players again.

command.title: Tactics room
command.description: Build the XI, validate positional fit and define how the team should react during the match.
command.readinessTitle: The plan is ready to compete

sideTabs.settingsHint: Shape, positional fit and team levers
sideTabs.styleHint: Attacking plan, defensive plan and zones

style.title: Playing style
style.hint: Rock-paper-scissors against the opponent's style. Not choosing gives them +10.
style.helpIntro: Your offensive style against the opponent's defensive style gives you +6/+2 build-up if you win, or gives them +6/+4 disruption if they counter you.
style.helpItem1: Stretch play: beats Central press, stopped by Wide press.
style.helpItem2: Short passes: beats Wide press, stopped by Central press.
style.helpItem3: In behind: beats High line, stopped by Offside trap / Midfield press.
style.helpItem4: Between the lines: beats Offside trap, stopped by High line / Midfield press.
style.helpItem5: Long balls: beats Midfield press, stopped by Offside trap / High line.
style.warnBoth: No styles selected: opponent gains +10 on both sides.
style.warnOffensive: No offensive style: opponent defence gains +10.
style.warnDefensive: No defensive style: opponent attack gains +10.

zones.title: Zones
zones.hint: Attack % per channel and defensive reinforcement ({{pts}} pts with {{defs}} defenders; each point −5% to opponent in that channel).

subs.title: Scheduled substitutions
subs.hint: They run automatically during the match when the condition is met.
subs.empty: No substitutions are scheduled. Add one to automate the bench.

matchPlan.title: Conditional match plan
matchPlan.hint: «IF <score> THEN <levers>» rules the engine applies only during the match from the chosen minute. Seed-reproducible.
matchPlan.empty: No rules yet. Add one to react to the score.

appliedChanges.title: Applied adjustments (last match)
appliedChanges.unseen: Mark the last match result as seen to view the adjustments your plan executed.
appliedChanges.none: Your conditional plan did not trigger in the last match.
appliedChanges.error: ⚠ Could not load last match adjustments.

scout.title: Scouting
scout.noStaff: No scouts. Hire your first one.
scout.hireFirst: Hire a scout to create missions.

empty.historyHint: Accepted or rejected negotiations will appear here.

negotiations.acceptConfirm: Accept this transfer proposal? The move will be executed irreversibly.
negotiations.rejectConfirm: Reject this proposal? You won't be able to recover it.
negotiations.counterHint: Your counter-offer rejects it and opens a reverse proposal.

training.title: Training

training.stimulateBody: Give a motivational team talk to the home squad?
training.stimulateHint: Will boost morale and performance in the next home match, using one directive charge.
training.controlHint: Turn {{turn}}. Close training (3t) or give a home team talk (2t). Directive cost after use 2.
training.emptyCoachesHint: Hire coaches by category to improve your players in each session.
training.staffFull: Backroom staff full ({{current}}/{{max}}). Dismiss a coach to hire another.
training.playsHint: Each play in development uses 1 training slot. Maximum 8 active plays per match (FDF rule §2.7).

command.readyHint: Every line is covered and all starters have a group.
command.needsWorkHint: {{missing}} areas without a coach · {{unassigned}} starters without a group

tunnel.loadingBody: Re-simulating the match from the original seed. Keep this window open…
tunnel.successBefore: You are watching a live re-simulation based on the
tunnel.successAfter: . The flow matches what happened that day.

campus.title: Campus facilities
campus.desc: The lit floor marks your academy's tech progress. Each level raises youth players' base average.

youth.title: Prospects in development
youth.empty: Facilities are empty. Scouts are searching for talent.

upgrades.title: Development tree
upgrades.lede: Invest club funds to expand facilities and improve youth training quality.

formula.title: FDF archives: talent generation
formula.l1: · Every ~3 in-game months, one player graduates per residence (you can choose their position).
formula.l2: · Base average = residence level × 3 + random(−5..25) − random(0..residences) + 13 + location value (1-20). Capped between 20 and 75.
formula.l3: · Each attribute = average − 50 + random(0..30) − position penalty.
formula.l4: · Talent (ceiling) = attribute + 50 + random(0..15). The sports city raises the range (without it 15-60; level 8: 43-84).
formula.l5: · Global annual limit: 3 players with 7 bars and 21 with 6 bars. Retired icons add a bonus.
